nonClosureRule: A bounded implementation may advance status but must not delete source text, erase remaining obligations, or claim the whole idea from a proxy.

obligations.invariant: No release or proxy may be called the complete Bubble universe while a recorded reasonable consequence remains unrealizable.
remainingLimits: The completeness frontier and the closure rule for newly derived reasonable concepts remain open.
obligations.reopenCondition: Always live until the author accepts a complete connected realization and its derivation ledger.

obligations.invariant: Change, reversibility, recurrence, causal order, and irreversible history remain distinct without a mandatory scalar clock.
remainingLimits: Exact closure-lasso recurrence and lifecycle history direction exist without a universal clock, but duration, metric time, concurrency, general coinduction, and cross-world synchronization remain open.
obligations.reopenCondition: Reopen for every world law requiring concurrency, duration, metric time, general cycles, or cross-bubble order.

obligations.invariant: World continuation follows from one coupled lawful structure and never from a hidden host selector or an unrelated menu of regimes.
remainingLimits: Actor-neutral structures persist, have bounded teleonomic evidence, form finite endogenous branches, and have a completed bounded finite causal birth/retirement seam with no host selection, but deliberative agency, relationships, dynamic schemas and populations, cross-world transfer, and complete universe generation remain open.
obligations.reopenCondition: Remains open through every stronger self-generated continuation seam until the whole connected universe is realized.

obligations.invariant: A Bubble can lawfully generate its own connected internal whole without the host inventing missing world semantics.
remainingLimits: Internal laws generate bounded causal closure, sustain one derived recurrent component, and can actualize a finitely predeclared latent world graph, but they do not generate the whole field schema, law set, entity population, open-ended multi-world universe, or successor implementation.
obligations.reopenCondition: Remains open through every partial self-generation slice.

obligations.concept: emergent agency and autonomous narrative possibility
obligations.invariant: A Bubble may lawfully form persistent beings, agency, relations, and coherent histories without requiring those labels as primitive fields or making them depend on World Will.
remainingLimits: Canonical and distributed-state recurrent components have bounded teleonomic evidence, and v0.5.5 realizes simultaneous world alternatives without a host selector, but no internal being represents, prefers, or selects among them; deliberative agency, relationships, and narrative projection are not derived.
obligations.reopenCondition: Remains open after v0.5.6 until a relation- or preference-mediated internal selection structure supplies a stronger counterfactual agency contract without a mandatory agent label.

obligations.concept: objective World Will and anchor-mediated intervention
obligations.invariant: World Will acts under explicit objective and constraint structure, and any cross-world intervention is carried by an anchor with identity and causal provenance.
remainingLimits: World Will executes exact bounded optimization through active local anchors, cannot write protected structure or invoke lifecycle directly, and respects inactive lifecycle endpoints in bounded v0.5.6, but cross-world transfer and a full identity calculus remain open.
obligations.reopenCondition: Remains open until anchor-cut and World-Will-disabled counterfactuals discriminate the mechanisms.

obligations.invariant: Positive and negative seas materially alter world viability, continuity, and intervention conditions without becoming moral labels or decorative scores.
remainingLimits: Exact local negative-sea admission causes erosion and restoration, and retirement now retains a local negative-sea residue without claiming transport, but global multi-world sea movement, continuous membrane dynamics, and positive-sea placement/growth remain open.
obligations.reopenCondition: Reopen from the first concrete global transport, cross-world membrane, or positive-sea placement law.

obligations.invariant: Natural language preserves intent but executable truth is a typed formal object able to denote unbounded and infinite-dimensional structures without eager enumeration.
remainingLimits: The kernel covers exact countable index products, guarded natural recursion, state-bound narrative queries, and one strict authored causal-lifecycle lowering profile, not uncountable domains, coinductive streams, symbolic limits, integration, general authored intensional families, typed cross-world transfer, or a portable BIR.
obligations.reopenCondition: Reopen whenever a required Bubble object cannot be denoted or queried without opaque host behavior.

obligations.invariant: The meaning of the unique or core world and its anchor relation must remain explicit; no implementation may silently install one privileged absolute original.
remainingLimits: Lineage-relative addressing exists, but the intended topology of 고유 세계 remains an author question.
obligations.reopenCondition: Must be resolved with the author before a root-world hierarchy becomes executable semantics.

obligations.invariant: A future Bubble may generate modules, a successor form of itself, and executable formal code only with preserved semantics, provenance, verification, and resource boundaries.
remainingLimits: Current Bubble can stage artifacts, grammar descriptions, and bounded internal causal events but cannot generate, verify, rebuild, or execute a successor implementation of itself.
obligations.reopenCondition: Reopen only after every prior obligation is realized and the author explicitly accepts the current Bubble universe as complete.

obligations.invariant: The universal Bubble core is causal world structure rather than a mandatory plot schema, while agent and narrative structures remain lawfully realizable rather than forbidden.
remainingLimits: The actor-neutral substrate generates bounded persistent teleonomic structures, finite endogenous branch worlds, and a completed bounded finite lifecycle with one strict causal `.bubble` lowering path, but deliberative agency, relationships, narrative projection, dynamic schemas and populations, typed cross-world transfer, general coinduction, and whole-universe generation are not yet derived.
obligations.reopenCondition: Reopen after v0.5.6 at the smallest organically generated relation, internal selector, dynamic world structure, or wider connected-world structure beyond its accepted evidence contract.

obligations.concept: trans-Turing world semantics and computability provenance
obligations.invariant: Bubble must distinguish effective host computation, intensional or axiomatic world denotation, internal causal accessibility, oracle-relative computation, limit-derived semantics, and physical substrate assumptions; no runtime feature may claim non-Turing power without typed provenance for the extra computational resource.
remainingLimits: The current runtime has exact computable rational values, countable intensional families, guarded natural recursion, finite causal closure, and finite endogenous branching. It has no typed oracle, computability degree, ordinal limit transition, non-computable exact continuum source, physical hypercomputation contract, or provenance-aware replay distinction for non-effective results.
obligations.reopenCondition: Reopen through Q-026 only after a formal comparison identifies where additional computational strength enters and preserves anchor identity, internal accessibility, honest undetermined results, and distinct replay contracts.

obligations.invariant: Bubble semantics remain independent of TypeScript, Rust, storage encoding, host scheduling, and one physical machine while every optimized backend preserves exact lawful outcomes, provenance, resource-boundary honesty, and replay identity.
remainingLimits: The strict causal source profile now separates authored syntax from the typed runtime object, but TypeScript remains the only executable kernel and digests still depend on JavaScript stable serialization; no machine-independent BIR, canonical binary contract, engine ABI, compiled law form, differential backend suite, deterministic parallel contract, or Rust implementation exists.
obligations.reopenCondition: Remain open through late 5.x semantic-contract closure and the 6.x Rust transition; reopen for every backend, accelerator, distributed executor, nonstandard substrate, or optimization that could change world meaning or resource-boundary evidence.

sessionConstraints.rule: The v0.5.1 development session was required to leave its completion work uncommitted for author review.
v0.5.2 must preserve the pre-implementation philosophy and correct v0.5.1 by forward generalization rather than rewriting the pushed release.
